'''ât-f-z''' ('''katafaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yill|yill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yill|yill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| katafaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitafaz|thitafaz]] || [[word:jitafaz|jitafaz]] || [[word:shitafaz|shitafaz]] || [[word:kitafaz|kitafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutafaz|thuthutafaz]] || [[word:jujutafaz|jujutafaz]] || [[word:shushutafaz|shushutafaz]] || [[word:kukutafaz|kukutafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutafaz|thutafaz]] || [[word:jutafaz|jutafaz]] || [[word:shutafaz|shutafaz]] || [[word:kutafaz|kutafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutafaz|thutafaz]] || [[word:jutafaz|jutafaz]] || [[word:shutafaz|shutafaz]] || [[word:kutafaz|kutafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetafaz|thetafaz]] || [[word:jetafaz|jetafaz]] || [[word:shetafaz|shetafaz]] || [[word:ketafaz|ketafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotafaz|thothotafaz]] || [[word:jojotafaz|jojotafaz]] || [[word:shoshotafaz|shoshotafaz]] || [[word:kokotafaz|kokotafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotafaz|thotafaz]] || [[word:jotafaz|jotafaz]] || [[word:shotafaz|shotafaz]] || [[word:kotafaz|kotafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotafaz|thotafaz]] || [[word:jotafaz|jotafaz]] || [[word:shotafaz|shotafaz]] || [[word:kotafaz|kotafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtafaz|thĂŠtafaz]] || [[word:jĂŠtafaz|jĂŠtafaz]] || [[word:shĂŠtafaz|shĂŠtafaz]] || [[word:kĂŠtafaz|kĂŠtafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatafaz|thathatafaz]] || [[word:jajatafaz|jajatafaz]] || [[word:shashatafaz|shashatafaz]] || [[word:kakatafaz|kakatafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatafaz|thatafaz]] || [[word:jatafaz|jatafaz]] || [[word:shatafaz|shatafaz]] || [[word:katafaz|katafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafaz|thatafaz]] || [[word:jatafaz|jatafaz]] || [[word:shatafaz|shatafaz]] || [[word:katafaz|katafaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatafaz|shatafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatafaz|goshatafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatafaz|gokishatafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatafaznĂŒ|shatafaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatafaznknĂŒ|goshatafaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatafaznĂŒ|gokishatafaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatafazshĂ«|shatafazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatafaznkshĂ«|goshatafaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatafazshĂ«|gokishatafazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatafazro|shatafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatafaznkro|goshatafaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatafazro|gokishatafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatafazmu|shatafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatafaznkmu|goshatafaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatafazmu|gokishatafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatafazsher|shatafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatafaznksher|goshatafaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatafazsher|gokishatafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatafazng|shatafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatafaznkng|goshatafaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatafazng|gokishatafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatafazya|shatafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatafaznkya|goshatafaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatafazya|gokishatafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatafazyam|shatafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatafaznkyam|goshatafaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatafazyam|gokishatafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatafaznĂŒshĂ«|shatafaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatafaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshatafaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatafaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishatafaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatafaznĂŒro|shatafaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatafaznknĂŒro|goshatafaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatafaznĂŒro|gokishatafaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatafaznĂŒmu|shatafaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatafaznknĂŒmu|goshatafaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatafaznĂŒmu|gokishatafaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatafazshĂ«nĂŒ|shatafazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatafaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatafaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatafazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatafazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatafazshĂ«ro|shatafazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatafaznkshĂ«ro|goshatafaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatafazshĂ«ro|gokishatafazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatafazshĂ«mu|shatafazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatafaznkshĂ«mu|goshatafaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatafazshĂ«mu|gokishatafazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatafazronĂŒ|shatafazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatafaznkronĂŒ|goshatafaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatafazronĂŒ|gokishatafazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatafazroshĂ«|shatafazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatafaznkroshĂ«|goshatafaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatafazroshĂ«|gokishatafazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatafazromu|shatafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatafaznkromu|goshatafaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatafazromu|gokishatafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatafazmunĂŒ|shatafazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatafaznkmunĂŒ|goshatafaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatafazmunĂŒ|gokishatafazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatafazmushĂ«|shatafazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatafaznkmushĂ«|goshatafaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatafazmushĂ«|gokishatafazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatafazmuro|shatafazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatafaznkmuro|goshatafaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatafazmuro|gokishatafazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
